# Ahmed Lotfy - Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
> Building high-performance web and mobile applications with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

## About
- [Portfolio Home](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en): Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js
- [About Ahmed](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/about): Experience, skills, and background
- [Contact](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/contact): Get in touch for projects and collaboration

## Projects
- [selfTracker](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/self-tracker): React Native mobile app with offline SQLite sync and ElectricSQL
- [TaskHub](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/task-hub-mcp-driven-project-management): MCP-driven project management with AI agent integration
- [POS System](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/pos-system): Full-stack point-of-sale system for local businesses
- [The Drive Center](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/the-drive-center): Car shipping e-commerce platform
- [Zamalek Store](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/zamalek-store): Online merchandise store
- [Hi-X LinkTree](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/hi-x): Link-in-bio page service
- [Applicence Manager](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/applicence-manager): Appliance management desktop application
- [Dev Challenges](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/dev-challenges): Curated developer challenge solutions
- [Book App](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/projects/book-app): Book discovery and catalog application

## Blog Topics
- [All Blog Posts](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/blogs): Technical articles on full-stack development, AI tools, and architecture
- [Next.js & React](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/blogs): Next.js 16, React 19, Server Components, performance optimization
- [React Native & Mobile](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/blogs): React Native, Expo, cross-platform development
- [AI & Dev Tools](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/blogs): AI coding agents, LLMs, automation pipelines
- [DevOps & Infrastructure](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/blogs): Docker, Dokploy, VPS hosting, CI/CD, Cloudflare
- [Architecture & Backend](https://ahmedlotfy.site/en/blogs): System design, databases, APIs, TypeScript

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, Redis
- **Mobile**: React Native, Expo
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Dokploy, VPS, Cloudflare, Cloudflare R2
- **Tools**: Bun, Git, GitHub Actions
